title: IELTS Task 2: Argument Essay Template
description: A clear paragraph-by-paragraph template for opinion and discussion essays, with annotated model paragraphs showing how to structure arguments at Band 7+.

title: Academic Collocation List (Top 200)
description: The 200 most useful verb-noun and adjective-noun collocations for academic writing, organised by topic, with example sentences drawn from real IELTS topics.

title: IELTS Speaking Part 2: Topic Cards
description: 30 print-ready cue cards covering the most frequently tested Part 2 topics, with vocabulary prompts and sample answer outlines for each card.

title: Academic Paragraph Writing: PEEL Model
description: A worksheet introducing the PEEL (Point – Evidence – Explanation – Link) paragraph structure, with guided practice exercises and feedback checklists.

title: Pronunciation: English Sounds for Chinese Learners
description: Targeted pronunciation guide addressing the specific phonological challenges Chinese L1 speakers face: final consonants, /l/ vs /r/, and vowel length.

title: Articles in English: A/An/The/Ø
description: A comprehensive grammar reference and practice sheet for articles — one of the most persistent difficulty areas for Chinese English learners. Includes rules, exceptions, and 40 practice items.

title: Hedging Language in Academic Writing
description: How to express uncertainty, caution, and qualification like an academic writer. Covers modal verbs, adverbs, and reporting verbs with practice examples.

title: Fluency Builder: 60-Second Talks
description: A set of 40 engaging topic cards for timed speaking practice. Students talk for 60 seconds on an accessible topic, building fluency and reducing hesitation.
